_doc: RES-d self-description drift allowlist (PRD-gap-close-canon §Automated Self-Description Counter; ADR-005 §Decision 2). Each axis reads its truth from a substrate-exposed source; every policed site below must agree with that truth. Allowlist-anchored, not a blind tree grep — the tree legitimately carries distinct 'N skills' / 'N MCP tools' figures about other subjects (a Ramp/Glass case study's 350 skills; VisionClaw's native 7 MCP tools; agentbox's 180+ MCP tools total), none of which describe a tracked axis.

skills.label: agentbox skill count
skills._files_note: The live self-description surface only. The book/report prose under presentation/ is a dated narrative artifact that uses 'N agent skills' rhetorically (e.g. a '10-15 agent skills' pilot-selection range, a TCO example) and is NOT whole-file scanned; its current-count references are reconciled by hand and recorded in the evidence file.

sites.pattern: Ontology bridge health check \((\d+) tools respond\)

ontology-classes.label: VisionClaw ontology owl:Class count
ontology-classes.reason: VisionClaw ClassCountSource (ddd-gap-close-visionclaw-context.md:155) is `planned`, not published as a script-queryable committed count this wave. Partial-source failure mode (ADR-005 §Decision 2): axis reported UNAVAILABLE, not enforced; a source being down blocks the axis, not the whole gate.

roster.label: forum agent_registry roster size
roster.reason: Not yet single-sourced; the forum must expose agent_registry as script-queryable before the counter can track it (DDD-gap-close-canon-context §12 open issue 3). Distinct from the 610 external turbo-flow templates and from the skill count.
